items.title: Indian Navy’s latest stealth frigate ‘INS Taragiri’ commissioned in Visakhapatnam
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Defence Indian Navy’s latest stealth frigate ‘INS Taragiri’ commissioned in Visakhapatnam The warship is a symbol of India’s growing technological prowess, self-reliance & formidable naval power, says Raksha Mantri “Building a strong & capable Navy is an absolute necessity in today’s times” Indian Navy is securing critical sea lanes, choke points & digital inf…
